description: Generic schema for layered RAG evaluation datasets in this project.

common_fields.id: Stable string id such as retr001 or qa001.
common_fields.question: User-facing question text.
common_fields.question_type: One of recommendation, referral, treatment_escalation, precautions, maintenance, lifestyle, support_governance, refusal, background.
common_fields.primary_source_required: Boolean indicating whether a guideline citation is required.
common_fields.gold_rec_ids: Primary gold recommendation ids when available.
common_fields.gold_chunk_ids: Primary gold chunk ids when exact chunk-level supervision is available.
common_fields.gold_support_doc_ids: Optional list of support documents relevant for supplementary evidence.
common_fields.reference_answer: Short canonical answer for grounded QA.
common_fields.must_include_points: Checklist of answer points that should appear.
common_fields.must_not_claim: Checklist of incorrect claims that should not appear.
